title: Netty Memory Tweaker
description: Adds a netty allocation options to the settings menu.
body:
## Features
* A button in main settings menu that allows switching between Netty memory allocator implementations

## Why it is useful
Recently (22 of May, 2024) Netty got a new memory allocator implementation in 4.1.110 release. This implementation reduces the overheads and gives better performance compared to the default one (Pooled).
